---
title: "Woo-Sung Hollenhorst"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: ./images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/your-profile
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/your-username
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your@email.com
---
